item.title: The Deadliest Shark Isn't the One You Think | Shark Science
item.description:
The bull shark and the tiger shark are not equals. Their hunting strategies, bite mechanics, territory, and kill records tell completely different stories.
The bull shark holds the highest testosterone levels of any animal on Earth. The tiger shark has one of the strongest bites ever recorded. One hunts in fresh water. The other hunts by sight. Only one controls the shallows — and the answer will change how you think about ocean safety forever.
CHAPTERS: 00:00 — The Myth We All Believed 02:15 — What the Attack Data Actually Shows 06:40 — The Real Deadliest Shark 11:30 — Why Nobody Told You 16:00 — What Science Says You Should Actually Fear Subscribe to Nature Frontiers for weekly wildlife science that sounds unbelievable — but is backed by real research. New videos every Monday, Wednesday, and Friday.
#BullShark #TigerShark #SharkAttack #DangerousSharks #MarineBiology #ApexPredator #SharkScience #Wildlife #NatureFrontiers #SharkFacts #OceanWildlife #DeepSea #NatureDocumentary #Shark #WildlifeScience
